name: RPlog_Starting_a_War
title: A Scratch on Malign's X-Wing
summary: On a tense night at a Corellian spaceport, the smuggler-pilot Axel Vichten tracks down the X-Wing of the Sith Tyler Damion, the pilot who humiliated him over Bonadan, and keys a long scratch down its hull in petty retaliation. Damion, still aboard, emerges unbothered and the two rivals trade philosophy about fame, pride, and the dying breed of old war-hawk pilots, with Damion offering grudging respect and even an invitation to fly together. When Axel lets slip that the supposedly dead Danik Kreldin intends to assassinate Emperor Vadim, Damion's casual manner hardens into that of the Emperor's loyal enforcer Darth Malign. He bargains: in exchange for the full plot, he will hand Danik over to Axel and declare war on the Kreldin family, seizing their property, while warning Axel that he cannot shield Axel's friends or his neutral homeworld of Caspar from the Empire's wrath. Axel reveals the conspirators' names and his demands, then walks off satisfied that his old enemy will soon be stripped of his power and put on the run, as news breaks that the CDU has severed relations with the Empire.
